title: The 'Big One' could strike in New Zealand: Scientists discover an active fault line running through Auckland - and warn it could spark a 6.8 magnitude earthquake at any time
description: The 'Big One' earthquake is usually associated with California. But scientists have warned that it could strike in New Zealand - after finding an active fault line running through the country.
content:
The 'Big One' earthquake is usually associated with California. 
But scientists have warned that it could strike in New Zealand after finding an active fault line running through the country. 
Name… [+3489 chars]
de: Der „Große“ könnte in Neuseeland zuschlagen: Wissenschaftler entdecken eine aktive Verwerfungslinie, die durch Auckland verläuft – und warnen, dass sie jederzeit ein Erdbeben der Stärke 6,8 auslösen könnte. Das „Big One“-Erdbeben wird normalerweise mit Kalifornien in Verbindung gebracht. Wissenschaftler haben jedoch gewarnt, dass es in Neuseeland zuschlagen könnte – nachdem sie eine aktive Verwerfungslinie entdeckt hatten, die durch das Land verläuft.
en: The 'Big One' could strike in New Zealand: Scientists discover an active fault line running through Auckland - and warn it could spark a 6.8 magnitude earthquake at any time. The 'Big One' earthquake is usually associated with California. But scientists have warned that it could strike in New Zealand - after finding an active fault line running through the country.
la: "Big One" in Nova Zelandia percutere potuit: Scientistae detegunt culpam activam per Auckland lineam currentem - et monent scintillam a 6.8 magnitudine motus aliquando posse. Terrae motus magnus in California fere coniungitur. Sed docti monuerunt eum in Nova Zelandia percutere posse - postquam culpam activam per regionem currit rectam invenire.
